# Teacher Grading Notes

These notes are synthetic guidance for reviewing the Python Score Summary assignment.

## Learning Goals

- Use clear function boundaries.
- Handle empty input safely.
- Count scores at or above the passing threshold.
- Return a predictable dictionary from `score_report`.
- Keep the implementation readable for a beginner Python course.

## Review Guidance

Give full credit when the submitted code implements all three required functions and handles the listed edge cases.

Give partial credit when the main structure is present but one requirement is missing, such as excluding scores equal to the passing threshold.

Route to review when the code has syntax errors, missing functions, or result shapes that do not match the assignment.

## Feedback Style

Feedback should name the specific function that needs work and suggest the smallest next correction.
